testcase.name: test_label_printer_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing supported_connections field assert 'supported_connections' in {'connection_types': ['TCP/IP (Port 9100)', 'Network', 'WiFi', 'USB (via CUPS)'], 'default_ip': '192.168.1.100', 'default_port': 9100, 'label_size': {'height_mm': 29, 'height_px': 271, 'width_mm': 62, 'width_px': 696}, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_kit_assembly_features.py:58: in test_label_printer_status assert "supported_connections" in data, "Missing supported_connections field" E AssertionError: Missing supported_connections field E assert 'supported_connections' in {'connection_types': ['TCP/IP (Port 9100)', 'Network', 'WiFi', 'USB (via CUPS)'], 'default_ip': '192.168.1.100', 'default_port': 9100, 'label_size': {'height_mm': 29, 'height_px': 271, 'width_mm': 62, 'width_px': 696}, ...}

testcase.name: test_kit_template_details

failure.message: AssertionError: Component missing type assert 'type' in {'asset_type': 'tab_sp4', 'label': 'Surface Pro 4', 'notes': 'Surface Pro 4 oder SP6', 'optional': False, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_kit_assembly_features.py:149: in test_kit_template_details assert "type" in comp, "Component missing type" E AssertionError: Component missing type E assert 'type' in {'asset_type': 'tab_sp4', 'label': 'Surface Pro 4', 'notes': 'Surface Pro 4 oder SP6', 'optional': False, ...}

testcase.name: test_goods_receipt_create_with_label_ready
testcase.failure: tests/test_kit_assembly_features.py:205: in test_goods_receipt_create_with_label_ready assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
